Title: Prohibits charter schools from employing teachers who are uncertified or do not meet the same teaching certification requirements as public school teachers
Summary: Prohibits charter schools from employing teachers who are uncertified or do not meet the same teaching certification requirements as public school teachers.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to prohibiting charter schools from employing teachers who are uncertified or do not meet the same teaching certification requirements as public school teachers
